sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings in enterprise software are standard operational activities with no immediate financial impact.

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard operational activities and do not provide immediate financial or market impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
